dealCount.description: Total number of deals deployed by this factory.

getDeployedDeal.description: Read the full on-chain DealRecord for a dealId: issuer plus the deployed cluster addresses (token, compliance, identity registry, NAV oracle, distribution, capital-call, access manager, timelock) and deploy metadata.

implementations.description: The implementation/logic addresses the factory clones per deal (identity registry, compliance, NAV oracle, token, distribution, capital-call).

issuerRegistry.description: Address of the IssuerRegistry the factory checks before allowing a deal deployment (only approved issuers may deploy).

tokenRegistry.description: Address of the TokenRegistry the factory registers each newly deployed deal token into.

authority.description: Address of the PlatformAccessManager that controls who may call restricted functions.

upgradeAuthority.description: Address authorized to upgrade this factory's UUPS implementation. Read-only for visibility; changing it is a governance action handled elsewhere.

isPaused.description: Returns true if the factory is paused. While paused, createDeal reverts.

pauseFactory.description: Halt new deal deployments. createDeal reverts until the factory is unpaused. Provide a reason for the audit log.

unpauseFactory.description: Resume deal deployments after a pause.
